summary: Build a Minecraft-themed web app for XtreamCloud (purple/black) with login, plan selection, UPI payments (QR/UPI ID), and a post-payment hosting panel showing resource usage.

existing_features.title: Create the XtreamCloud site shell and navigation with a Minecraft-inspired theme and a purple + black color palette, using consistent typography, spacing, and components across all pages. Ensure the product name "XtreamCloud" appears prominently in the header and page titles.

Implement an authentication page (Page A) with two modes: Register and Login using an ID (username/email) and Password. Include an "Already logged in?" button/link that, when clicked (or when an active session is detected), routes the user automatically to Page B (Plans).
Create Page B (Plans) listing the four plans (HEXO, METEOR, DOOMSDAY, XTREME) with the exact pricing and specs provided, each with an "ORDER NOW" button.
Implement the payment UI for an order: allow choosing PhonePe, Google Pay, Paytm, or generic UPI; when the user clicks the Pay button, show a QR code and UPI payment details on-screen.
Create Page C (Hosting Panel) that is accessible after payment completion and shows the user’s purchased plan plus hosting resource information: storage (GB), RAM, CPU, and process info.
Generate and include Minecraft-inspired static branding assets (logo + background) and render them in the UI from frontend/public/assets/generated, without serving images via the backend.

new_feature_requests.summary: Create XtreamCloud Minecraft-themed site branding (name XtreamCloud, purple/black color scheme)
Implement Login section with ID/Password and an 'Already Login?' button that routes logged-in users to Page B automatically
Create Page B: Plans section listing HEXO/METEOR/DOOMSDAY/XTREME plans with specs and ORDER NOW buttons
Add payment methods (PhonePe, Google Pay, Paytm, UPI); on Pay click show QR code and UPI details
Create Page C: Hosting panel page shown after successful payment
Hosting panel UI should display allocated resources/usage: GB (storage), RAM, CPU, and process info

Add backend support for ID/password authentication with session handling (create account, login, logout, and a query to validate current session). Persist registered users and session data in the single Motoko actor.

Add backend order tracking so that when a user places an order for a plan and completes the payment flow, the canister records the purchased plan for that authenticated user and the frontend can load it on Page C.

architectural_notes: App uses multi-page flow: Login (Page A) -> Plans (Page B) -> Payment -> Hosting Panel (Page C).
Post-payment flow should gate access to the hosting panel until payment is completed/confirmed.
imageRequirements:
## Required Images
- Minecraft-inspired pixel/block-style logo with the wordmark “XtreamCloud”, purple/black palette (xtreamcloud-logo.dim_512x512.png)
- Minecraft-inspired banner/hero background featuring blocky terrain silhouettes and subtle purple lighting, dark/black base (xtreamcloud-hero-bg.dim_1920x1080.png)

generatedImages.description: Minecraft-inspired pixel/block-style logo with the wordmark “XtreamCloud”, purple/black palette
Minecraft-inspired banner/hero background featuring blocky terrain silhouettes and subtle purple lighting, dark/black base
